companion_files.name: PLAN.md
companion_files.content:
# PODCAST_SEARCH_NOTIFICATIONS_PLAN

## Date
- 2026-02-12

## Scope
- Podcast episode queue behavior when starting playback from older episodes.
- Main search experience improvements for podcast discovery.
- Suppress duplicate enrichment completion notifications after stack restart.

## Problems To Solve
1. Podcast playback currently queues all episodes and can auto-advance in the wrong direction for "older episode" playback.
2. Main search lacks a dedicated podcasts filter/tab and clear podcast-focused result views.
3. Enrichment completion notifications can be recreated after app restart even when enrichment was already complete.

## Implementation Plan
1. Podcast Queue Logic
- Update `frontend/features/podcast/hooks/usePodcastActions.ts`.
- Build an ascending-by-date episode sequence from the selected episode to latest.
- If selected episode is latest: clear queue (`setPodcastEpisodeQueue(null)`).
- If selected episode is older: set queue to selected+newer episodes only.

2. Search: Dedicated Podcasts Tab
- Update filter union and UI button:
- `frontend/features/search/types.ts`
- `frontend/features/search/components/SearchFilters.tsx`
- Extend search hook input to allow query type control:
- `frontend/features/search/hooks/useSearchData.ts`
- Update main page rendering and conditions:
- `frontend/app/search/page.tsx`
- Ensure podcast results link to podcast pages (`/podcasts/[id]`), for both library and discover podcast results.

3. Notification Dedup On Restart
- Update `backend/src/workers/unifiedEnrichment.ts`.
- Detect whether enrichment cycle started with outstanding work.
- Only send completion notification if the session actually had work remaining or processed work.
- Mark completion notification state to prevent repeated checks when starting from already-complete state.

4. Documentation
- Update `CHANGELOG.md` under `[1.5.0] - Unreleased`.

5. Validation
- Run frontend lint.
- Run backend validation command if feasible in current environment.

## Risks / Edge Cases
- Episode timestamps can tie or be missing precision; queue logic should rely on stable order after date sort.
- Podcast tab should not regress existing search sections (tracks/albums/artists/soulseek).
- Completion notification suppression must not block legitimate completion notifications for active sessions.
